---
title: "Orbis Historical"
page-layout: article
---

# Orbis Historical

**Provider:** Moody's

## Description

Historical company dataset from Orbis providing point-in-time information for longitudinal business research. Supports analysis of firm characteristics, ownership, and financial data over time.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Request Required
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUQ0lDR1NIMkwxUVRPUVNIWTZMV1FCVzc2QSQlQCN0PWcu)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
